equity.label: S&P 500 equity signal
equity.note: A 5-session drawdown adds pressure. A 5-session rally adds relief and can partially offset the composite score.

rates.label: 2Y Treasury rate pressure
rates.note: Rates pressure reflects both the current 2Y level and any fresh 5-session rise.

inflation.label: Inflation expectations pressure
inflation.note: Inflation pressure reflects both the breakeven level and any fresh 5-session rise.

volatility.label: VIX volatility pressure
volatility.note: Higher implied volatility usually means greater market stress.

title: 2025-08-01 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 33.58
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-08-01: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 33.58/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity signal and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-08-01, the score printed 33.58/100 in the elevated regime, with equity signal and volatility doing most of the work.
